cards.example: Please send me the travel itinerary.
Keep your boarding pass until you land.
We have a three-hour layover in Dubai.
The freight was delayed due to customs.
We use three different carriers for deliveries.
The shipment is expected to arrive on Friday.
Customs clearance took longer than expected.
The warehouse holds up to ten thousand units.
The order was dispatched yesterday morning.
We chartered a flight for the executive team.
Deliveries are made at the loading dock.
Please check in at least two hours before departure.
Mileage is reimbursed at a fixed rate per kilometre.
The terminal is a ten-minute walk from the hotel.
She bought perfume at the duty-free shop.
The fastest route avoids the motorway.
The company manages a fleet of twenty vehicles.
He paid extra for overweight baggage.
The ETA has been updated to 4 p.m.
The goods are currently in transit.
